data.content_ref: inline:The mechanism relies on seismic disruption of port infrastructure and grain stores to break the redistributive feedback loop, yet the forbidden case only guards against intact facilities at Ugarit. The account fails to specify why earthquake damage would be simultaneously catastrophic across the entire Eastern Mediterranean—a seismically active region where individual palace centers had weathered earthquakes before without systemic collapse. Without evidence of a single, temporally clustered seismic event horizon across all covered regions, the mechanism reduces to an ad hoc coincidence rather than a causal explanation.
